CREATE TABLE WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests (id INT PRIMARY KEY, url VARCHAR(255), operation VARCHAR(50), parameters TEXT, auth_type VARCHAR(20), ticket VARCHAR(50), security_type VARCHAR(20), target_namespace VARCHAR(255), soap_action VARCHAR(255), style INT);
CREATE TABLE WS.SOAPDEMO.Responses (request_id INT, response TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (request_id) REFERENCES WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests(id));

INSERT INTO WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests (id, url, operation, parameters, auth_type, ticket, security_type, target_namespace, soap_action, style) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com/SecureWebServices', 'AddInt', 'vector(vector(''a'', ''int''), 3, vector(''b'', ''int''), 4)', 'key', 'xenc_key_inst_create(''WSDK Sample Symmetric Key'')', 'encrypt', 'http://temp.uri/', 'http://temp.uri/#AddInt', 6);

INSERT INTO WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests (id, url, operation, parameters, auth_type, ticket, security_type, target_namespace, soap_action, style) VALUES (2, 'http://soapinterop.org', 'echoVoidSoapHeader', 'vector()', 'none', 'none', 'none', 'http://soapinterop.org', 'http://soapinterop.org', 7);

SELECT xpath_eval('//CallReturn/text()', xml_tree_doc(soap_client(url=>'http://example.com/SecureWebServices', operation=>'AddInt', parameters=>vector(vector(''a'', ''int''), 3, vector(''b'', ''int''), 4), auth_type=>''key'', ticket=>xenc_key_inst_create(''WSDK Sample Symmetric Key''), security_type=>''encrypt'', target_namespace=>''http://temp.uri/'', soap_action=>''http://temp.uri/#AddInt'', style=>6)));
SELECT response FROM WS.SOAPDEMO.Responses WHERE request_id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests);
DELETE FROM WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests WHERE id = ANY(SELECT id FROM WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests WHERE operation = ''AddInt'');

SELECT xpath_eval('//CallReturn/text()', xml_tree_doc(soap_client(url=>'https://localhost:4443/secure', operation=>'SOAPTEST', parameters=>vector(''par'', ''demotext''), ticket=>''cli5.p12'', passwd=>''secret'')));
UPDATE WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests SET parameters = 'vector(vector(''a'', ''int''), 5, vector(''b'', ''int''), 10)' WHERE id = 1;

WITH req AS (SELECT id FROM WS.SOAPDEMO.Requests WHERE operation = ''echoVoidSoapHeader'' LIMIT 1) SELECT xpath_eval('//CallReturn/text()', xml_tree_doc(soap_client(url=>'http://soapinterop.org', operation=>'echoVoidSoapHeader', parameters=>vector(), headers=>vector(vector(''echoMeStringRequest'', ''http://soapinterop.org/:echoMeStringRequest'', 1, ''http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/actor/next''), vector(''String'')), style=>7, soap_action=>''http://soapinterop.org'', target_namespace=>''http://soapinterop.org'')) FROM req;
